code.title: Next.js App Router
items: Use the App Router (app/) directory structure
Prefer Server Components by default; add 'use client' only when necessary
Co-locate page components, loading.tsx, error.tsx, and layout.tsx within route segments
Use next/image for all images to enable automatic optimization

code.title: Data Fetching
items: Fetch data in Server Components using async/await directly
Use React cache() to deduplicate requests within a render
Prefer fetch() with Next.js cache options over third-party data-fetching libraries in Server Components
Use SWR or React Query only in Client Components

code.title: Styling
items: Use Tailwind CSS utility classes as the primary styling approach
Avoid inline styles except for dynamic values
Use CSS Modules for component-scoped styles when Tailwind is insufficient

testing.title: Next.js Testing
items: Use Vitest for unit and integration tests
Use React Testing Library for component tests
Mock next/navigation hooks (useRouter, usePathname) in tests
